heading: Stipends
label: 5352 Stipends
text: The head of each agency, and the District of Columbia Council with respect to the government of the District of Columbia, shall fix the stipends of its student-employees. The stipend may not exceed the applicable maximum prescribed by the Office of Personnel Management.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesDerivationU.S. CodeRevised Statutes andStatutes at Large (1st sentence).5 U.S.C. 1051(1st sentence), .Aug. 4, 1947, ch. 452, § 361 Stat. 727Standard changes are made to conform with the definitions applicable and the style of this title as outlined in the preface to the report.
